'''dhapaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oestrogenism|oestrogenism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-p-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oestrogenism|oestrogenism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhapaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæpæjæth|dhæpæjæth]] || [[word:dhæpæjæj|dhæpæjæj]] || [[word:dhæpæjæsh|dhæpæjæsh]] || [[word:dhæpæjæ|dhæpæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhapapajath|dhapapajath]] || [[word:dhapapajaj|dhapapajaj]] || [[word:dhapapajash|dhapapajash]] || [[word:dhapapaja|dhapapaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhapajath|dhapajath]] || [[word:dhapajaj|dhapajaj]] || [[word:dhapajash|dhapajash]] || [[word:dhapaja|dhapaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhapafjath|dhapafjath]] || [[word:dhapafjaj|dhapafjaj]] || [[word:dhapafjash|dhapafjash]] || [[word:dhapafjaf|dhapafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhapajatha|dhapajatha]] || [[word:dhapajaja|dhapajaja]] || [[word:dhapajasha|dhapajasha]] || [[word:dhapajaka|dhapajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhapajath|dhapajath]] || [[word:dhapajaj|dhapajaj]] || [[word:dhapajash|dhapajash]] || [[word:dhapaja|dhapaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhapajathal|dhapajathal]] || [[word:dhapajajal|dhapajajal]] || [[word:dhapajashal|dhapajashal]] || [[word:dhapajakal|dhapajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhapajathatha|dhapajathatha]] || [[word:dhapajajaja|dhapajajaja]] || [[word:dhapajashasha|dhapajashasha]] || [[word:dhapajaka|dhapajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhapajathan|dhapajathan]] || [[word:dhapajajan|dhapajajan]] || [[word:dhapajashan|dhapajashan]] || [[word:dhapajakan|dhapajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhapajathaoro|dhapajathaoro]] || [[word:dhapajajaoro|dhapajajaoro]] || [[word:dhapajashaoro|dhapajashaoro]] || [[word:dhapajakaoro|dhapajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
